_comment: THE VALUE TIER — the ONLY repos the autonomous fleet may spend a token on, ranked by time-to-an-actual-dollar (goal: real income before August 2026). Everything NOT listed here gets ZERO auto-generated/auto-mined work. This is Anthony's priorities — edit freely; add a repo to fund it with fleet effort, remove one to starve it. Fail-closed: if this list is empty, the generator produces nothing rather than flooding all repos.
